blended.narrative: Mount Bohemia is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,210 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: light freezing drizzle, highs of 42°F.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
